---
title: "Friends"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

<video class="hero-video-only" autoplay muted loop playsinline>
  <source src="images/friends-8.mp4" type="video/mp4">
</video>

# Friends

The people who make life warmer — shared memories, laughter, support, and the moments that matter most.

<div class="media-gallery">
  <img src="images/friends-1.jpg" alt="Friends 1" class="media-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(0, friendsMedia)">
  <img src="images/friends-2.jpg" alt="Friends 2" class="media-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(1, friendsMedia)">
  <img src="images/friends-3.jpg" alt="Friends 3" class="media-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(2, friendsMedia)">
  <img src="images/friends-4.jpg" alt="Friends 4" class="media-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(3, friendsMedia)">
  <img src="images/friends-5.jpg" alt="Friends 5" class="media-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(4, friendsMedia)">
  <img src="images/friends-6.jpg" alt="Friends 6" class="media-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(5, friendsMedia)">
  <img src="images/friends-7.jpg" alt="Friends 7" class="media-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(6, friendsMedia)">
  <img src="images/friends-9.jpg" alt="Friends 9" class="media-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(7, friendsMedia)">
  <img src="images/friends-10.jpg" alt="Friends 10" class="media-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(8, friendsMedia)">
  <div class="video-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(9, friendsMedia)">▶ Video</div>
</div>

<script>
const friendsMedia = [
  {type: "image", src: "images/friends-1.jpg"},
  {type: "image", src: "images/friends-2.jpg"},
  {type: "image", src: "images/friends-3.jpg"},
  {type: "image", src: "images/friends-4.jpg"},
  {type: "image", src: "images/friends-5.jpg"},
  {type: "image", src: "images/friends-6.jpg"},
  {type: "image", src: "images/friends-7.jpg"},
  {type: "image", src: "images/friends-9.jpg"},
  {type: "image", src: "images/friends-10.jpg"},
  {type: "video", src: "images/friends-8.mp4"}
];
</script>

<script src="gallery.js"></script>
